# NodeAttribute.FormulaGbid property

`gbidFormula` at specifier `+48` (DT_GBID). `0xFFFFFFFF` means "no shared formula — use [`InlineFormula`](./InlineFormula.md)"; otherwise it is `GbidHash(formulaName)` resolvable through [`AttributeFormulaTable`](../AttributeFormulaTable.md).

```csharp
public uint FormulaGbid { get; set; }
```
